tools.name: detect_regulatory_drift
tools.description: Scan for regulation changes affecting DORA. Checks RegWatch + LawOracle + EU feeds.

tools.name: detect_evidence_drift
tools.description: Find stale assessments + expired evidence + degraded controls.

tools.name: detect_cloud_drift
tools.description: Cloud provider status changes — live check.

tools.name: detect_control_drift
tools.description: Controls that degraded from GREEN to YELLOW/RED.

tools.name: full_drift_scan
tools.description: Run ALL 5 drift detections in one call (regulatory + evidence + cloud + control + ENTERPRISE). Enterprise dimension scans NIS2, LkSG, ISO 27001, Contracts, Tax, Healthcare via MEGA MCP oracles.

tools.name: drift_status
tools.description: Current open drift events per entity.

tools.name: mark_drift
tools.description: Manually mark an article as DRIFT.

tools.name: trigger_remediation
tools.description: Self-healing: sync all data, run escalation, collect evidence, auto-resolve drift events.

tools.name: detect_enterprise_drift
tools.description: Detect compliance drift across 6 enterprise dimensions: NIS2 (CyberShield), ISO 27001 (CyberShield), LkSG (SupplyChainOracle), Contract DORA Art.28 (LegalTechOracle), DAC6 Tax (TaxOracle), Healthcare MDR (HealthGuard). Auto-logs drift events.
